title: Starting My Game Development Journey
summary: An introduction to my game development journey, covering my initial motivations, the tools I chose, and the first steps I took to turn a lifelong interest into a real project.

title: Learning Object-Oriented Design Patterns in Unity
summary: A deep dive into how I applied classic OOP design patterns such as Abstract Factory and Mediator inside Unity to keep my codebase maintainable and loosely coupled following SOLID principles.

title: 3D Modelling Swords and Props in Blender
summary: An overview of my experience sculpting and modelling game-ready assets like swords and aircraft in Blender, including tips on topology, UV unwrapping, and exporting to Unity.

title: Building a 2D Real-Time Strategy Game: First Prototype
summary: Progress update on the story-driven 2D RTS game I am developing with a partner. This post covers our initial prototype decisions, the camera system, and early unit movement.

title: Animating Characters for Games with Blender
summary: Notes from my experience creating amateur character animations in Blender — rigging, weight painting, and exporting animation clips to Unity's Animator controller.

title: Exploring Godot as an Alternative Engine
summary: After spending time in Unity I decided to try Godot 4. This post compares the two engines from the perspective of a hobbyist developer, covering GDScript, the scene system, and editor workflow.
